arts.ttl: Will Erling Haaland be Available to Play for Manchester City Against Leicester City?
arts.sum: Erling Haaland was substituted in the second half of Manchester City's FA Cup game against Bournemouth with an apparent injury.

arts.ttl: Leicester City transfer latest: Jamie Vardy replacement on 'radar' ahead of possible Premier League relegation to Championship
arts.sum: Leicester City could look to address their goalscoring issues in the summer transfer window by signing a striker to step into Jamie Vardy's shoes.

arts.ttl: Man City games Erling Haaland could miss after injury update as Premier League blow confirmed

arts.ttl: Man City vs. Leicester: Pep Guardiola's side should 'comfortably' avoid 'disaster' as Premier League top-five prediction is made
arts.sum: Man City expert Steven McInerney tells Sports Mole that "something has to go disastrously wrong" for Pep Guardiola's side not to beat Leicester City in Wednesday's Premier League clash at the Etihad Stadium.

arts.ttl: City hopeful injury won't end Haaland's season
arts.sum: Erling Haaland is set for a spell on the sideline with an ankle injury picked up against Bournemouth on Sunday, but Manchester City remain hopeful the striker will be able to play again this season and take part in the FIFA Club World Cup this summer.

arts.ttl: Injury leaves Haaland in doubt for Norway vs Italy in World Cup Qualifiers
arts.sum: Erling Haaland will be sidelined for several weeks following an ankle injury with Manchester City,...

arts.ttl: Erling Haaland: Man City issue injury update in official statement as "expectation" is confirmed
arts.sum: Manchester City release an official statement confirming that Erling Haaland has suffered an injury to his left ankle and issue an update on when the striker could return to action.

arts.ttl: Manchester City suffer further setback as Erling Haaland sustains ankle injury
arts.sum: City’s top scorer has been ruled out for an unknown period with the club chasing a Champions League spot and victory in the FA Cup

arts.ttl: Erling Haaland expected to play again this season despite ankle injury
arts.sum: Striker suffers injury in FA Cup win over Bournemouth City expect Haaland to be fit for Club World Cup Manchester City expect Erling Haaland to play again this season despite their top-scorer suffering a serious ankle injury in Sunday’s FA Cup 2-1 win at Bournemouth that requires “specialist consultation” to determine the extent of his layoff. Haaland was forced off after 61 minutes at the Vitality Stadium, being replaced by Omar Marmoush. While the Egyptian scored the winner that took City into a Cup semi-final against Nottingham Forest, Haaland’s availability for the tie, which will be played on either 26 or 27 April, is in the balance.
